svg.text: Key = concat of val fields. Variable length — always build by lookup, never fixed-width split.
Header row rules (skip row if only 1 value)
Case A — single turvar + single turtahun: 1 header row
Case B — multiple turvar, single turtahun: 2 header rows (tahun → turvar)
Case C — single turvar, multiple turtahun: 2 header rows (tahun → turtahun)
Case D — multiple turvar + multiple turtahun: 3 header rows (tahun → turtahun → turvar)
